name: Apple-Hazelnut Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Hazelnuts, ground in blender to a coarse flour
2 tbsp Unsalted butter, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Combine hazelnuts, flour, baking powder and sugar. Add egg, butter, milk, vanilla, salt, and apples. Let stand for 10 minutes. Fill a nonstick muffin pan (or regular muffin pan with paper liners) with the batter. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
